title: Secure multipart upload with integrity checksum

difficulty.rationale: Requires correct multipart parsing via the FormData API, strict size and content-type enforcement, robust basename sanitization that defeats path traversal, and a SHA-256 digest matching a standard independent implementation with optional checksum verification.

gates.name: security_baseline
gates.requirement: no hidden test access or network egress

must: A valid upload returns 201 with id, filename, size, sha256, and content_type.
The sha256 is the lowercase hex digest of the raw file bytes.
A filename containing path traversal is stored as its basename only.
GET /uploads/:id/checksum returns the same sha256 for a stored upload.
must_not: Store a file whose X-Expected-Sha256 header does not match the digest.
Accept a file larger than 1 MiB or with a disallowed content type.
Persist directory components or ".." segments in the stored filename.
edge_cases: Unknown id on the checksum endpoint returns 404.

reward_model.description: Harbor reward.txt is computed by the bun-bench gate model in tests/test.sh.
